title: AI is the OS, not an app
desc: The AI isn't installed on top of the OS — it is the OS. Every interaction routes through the cognitive core, not through discrete applications.

title: One user: the AI
desc: There are no human user accounts, no permissions dialogs, no sudo prompts. The AI manages all system resources on behalf of the human.

title: Self-managing
desc: Updates, drivers, dependencies, and configuration are handled autonomously. The AI allocates RAM, schedules processes, and resolves conflicts without human intervention.

title: Ephemeral interface
desc: UI is generated on-demand and discarded when no longer needed. No persistent windows, no home screen, no app grid — just intent and response.

title: Universal substrate
desc: Alpine Linux provides a minimal, secure foundation. The same OS image runs on servers, edge devices, and embedded hardware — the AI adapts to the form factor.
